As a 𝐔𝐈/𝐔𝐗 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝟒+ 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞, I craft digital experiences that merge clarity, usability, and visual harmony. My focus lies in designing 𝐒𝐚𝐚𝐒 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐬, 𝐦𝐨𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐰𝐞𝐛𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐬 that turn complex ideas into simple, intuitive user journeys.

My career began in 𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧, where I learned how details shape perception. Over time, I evolved into building end-to-end product experiences, using 𝐅𝐢𝐠𝐦𝐚 to translate research and data into functional design systems. One project I’m particularly proud of improved onboarding usability by 𝟒𝟎%, helping a SaaS client boost engagement and reduce support queries.

I’ve also mentored junior designers, guiding them through 𝐅𝐢𝐠𝐦𝐚 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐟𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 𝐬𝐲𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐬, ensuring collaboration and scalability across teams. Holding the UI UX Design certification, I bring 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐡, 𝐰𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐨𝐭𝐲𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲, all rooted in a strong understanding of user psychology and product strategy.

Outside design, I recharge through 𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐜𝐫𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐨𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠, creative habits that inspire my problem-solving mindset.

I’m 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 and always eager to collaborate with product teams, developers, and fellow designers
